package handler

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Positive scenario for response_envelope_shaping_duplicated_across_handlers.
// Anti-pattern: Every handler repeats the same response envelope structure
// instead of using a shared helper or middleware.

func GetUsersHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	var users []User
	db.Find(&users)

	// Anti-pattern: duplicated response envelope
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
		"status": "success",
		"data":   users,
		"meta": gin.H{
			"page":       1,
			"per_page":   20,
			"total":      len(users),
			"total_pages": 1,
		},
	})
}

func GetUserHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	var user User
	if err := db.Where("id = ?", c.Param("id")).First(&user).Error; err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{
			"status": "error",
			"data":   nil,
			"meta":   nil,
			"error":  "user not found",
		})
		return
	}

	// Anti-pattern: same response envelope shape repeated
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
		"status": "success",
		"data":   user,
		"meta":   nil,
	})
}

func CreateOrderHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	var dto CreateOrderDTO
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&dto); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{
			"status": "error",
			"data":   nil,
			"meta":   nil,
			"error":  err.Error(),
		})
		return
	}

	order := Order{ProductID: dto.ProductID, Quantity: dto.Quantity}
	db.Create(&order)

	// Anti-pattern: same response envelope shape repeated again
	c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{
		"status": "success",
		"data":   order,
		"meta": gin.H{
			"created_at": order.CreatedAt,
		},
	})
}

func DeleteOrderHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	db.Where("id = ?", c.Param("id")).Delete(&Order{})

	// Anti-pattern: same response envelope shape repeated yet again
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
		"status": "success",
		"data":   nil,
		"meta": gin.H{
			"deleted": true,
		},
	})
}
